subcodes.first_line: O My beloved! The world hath neither permanence nor fidelity, and they who possess hearts should not in these days [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای حبیب من دنیا را قراری نه و وفائی نیست و صاحبان افئده نباید در این ایام
subcodes.subjects: @humility; meekness; lowliness, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @spiritual springtime, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life
